verse_text: Then the Lord said to Joshua, 'Today I shall begin to exalt you in the sight of all the children of Israel, so they will know that I shall be with you as I was with Moses.

links.context: **3:7** — [[JOS.3:7]], [[JOS.3:8]], [[JOS.3:15]]–17: This passage is read at Vespers of the Feast of the Theophany of the Lord.
